items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Don't care what you say, this is one of
items.summary: Don't care what you say, this is one of the only good gacha games left. Amazing story, good enough combat, very generous gacha... Genuinely ashamed I haven't played it earlier.
items.author: Murray Floyd
